Description:

Name: Leggal
Description:
In a world where legal challenges can emerge unexpectedly, finding affordable and accessible legal support remains a significant hurdle for many. Enter LEGGAL, a pioneering startup from Brazil, poised to change the landscape of legal services. Founded on a deeply personal experience, LEGGAL introduces a Legal Support Platform that seamlessly integrates into employee benefit packages, offering comprehensive and affordable legal support platform for employees.

LEGGAL addresses a significant market gap in Brazil, where legal services are often seen as costly and out of reach. On one side, an overwhelming 77% of the population views legal assistance as expensive and inaccessible, 32% of the workforce is ineligible for free legal aid, and 50% are unaware of potential legal solutions to their problems. On the other side, Brazil has the highest number of lawyers per capita globally, and almost half earn less than R$3000 monthly. The ecosystem is clearly broken and by offering affordable access, incorporating AI to streamline services, and generating income opportunities for lawyers, LEGGAL is more than a platform—it's a movement towards democratizing legal services.
This mission fuels LEGGAL’s commitment to offer:
- Affordable Access: LEGGAL's low monthly fee structure makes legal services accessible to a broader audience, eliminating the financial barrier that has long kept individuals from seeking legal help.
- AI Integration: The platform harnesses AI technology to simplify legal service navigation, making it user-friendly and efficient.
- Revenue Opportunities for Lawyers: LEGGAL aids registered lawyers in client acquisition, addressing their primary challenge of finding clients, thus generating new revenue streams.
- Inclusive Opportunities: Designed to ensure fairness, LEGGAL's platform promotes equal opportunities for all legal professionals.

Name: Healthcare Reporting
Description:
Healthcare Reporting is an organization committed to delivering smart and affordable services to Plan Sponsors, Brokers, TPAs, PBMs, Captives and the Stop-loss marketplace in general. We pride ourselves on having a high degree of technical expertise in benefits and blend that with high levels of client service.

Healthcare Reporting was originally founded in 2015 to address new compliance regulations required under the Affordable Care Act. Since that time the compliance and administration burden of our clients has continued to grow, and we have evolved to help meet those needs. 

Our next evolution occurred in 2017 when we released Self Insured Reporting, a Claim Reporting & Analytics technology that had been in the works for a decade prior. The platform was well received due to our full integration of the stop loss contract, robust financial reporting and stop loss reporting. It was not long before we were receiving data from 100+ different TPAs and 40+ different PBMs.

As the Consolidated Appropriations Act (CAA) was passed and implemented, it has brought with it additional compliance requirements as well as an increased focus on fiduciary duty by the Department of Labor. This was the catalyst to our offering various other compliance services such as Mental Health Parity, RxDC Reporting, Air Ambulance Reporting & Gag Clause Attestation assistance.

The implications of this move is that Plan Fiduciaries will have increased scrutiny regarding their management of Medical Plan Assets. We see this scrutiny occurring both for Plan Sponsors as well as TPAs (who are often considered fiduciaries by the courts.)

For these reasons we launched various Claim Services to help meet those fiduciary duties including Dialysis Cost Containment, Subrogation and Stop Loss Claim Filing.

Name: US Beacon
Description:
Founded in 1995, US BEACON is an independent medical and pharmacy claims compliance firm that protects self-funded health plans, TPAs, and stop-loss carriers from costly overpayments and non-compliant billing practices.

We perform pre-payment and post-payment claim audits, plan document reviews, and fiduciary compliance consulting to help plan sponsors meet their ERISA obligations and enforce the Transparency in Coverage and CAA 2021 requirements.

Our line-by-line clinical audits uncover:
	•	Upcoding and unbundling
	•	Duplicate or non-billable charges
	•	Fraud, waste, and abuse
	•	Billing irregularities and medical necessity errors

With an average 30–40% additional savings beyond network repricing and a less-than-0.25% appeal rate, US BEACON delivers measurable, compliant results.

We offer flexible pricing models — PEPM (per employee per month) or percentage of savings — depending on the client’s needs and claims volume.

Independent. Unbiased. Transparent.
US BEACON exists to protect the plan, protect the patient, and preserve every healthcare dollar.

Description:
Onuava is your Reproductive Health Benefits Partner for Continental Europe.
One in six heterosexual couples face challenges when trying to have children. LGBTQI+ and solo-parents also need medical support to become biological parents. In addition to the obvious medical and psychological challenges, those struggling with infertility face challenges around a lack of information, stigma and unfortunately also the cost of treatment.

Modern companies globally have realised that infertility and challenges around family building may have a significant negative impact on their employees' mental health and productivity at work. On the other hand, those companies which support their employees' throughout difficult personal times can count on improved employee satisfaction and increased loyalty. In challenging recruiting times the provision of fertility benefits can be an advantage for companies. In the US, 68% of employees state that they would change employers to have better fertility benefits. 

We work with modern companies in the DACH region which want to support their employees in their respective fertility and family-building journeys. We are a young, dynamic and growing company.  We work with companies of all sizes and across industries and can tailor our offering to companies' specific needs.

We support our clients' employees - our members - throughout their fertility and family-building journey, no matter the individual starting point and circumstances. This will allow our members to have all access to all the relevant information, so that they can make the best possible decisions in building their family.

ofelos ist Ihr Gesundheitspartner, wenn Sie das Wohlbefinden Ihrer Mitarbeiter stärken und neue Fachkräfte gewinnen möchten.

Die Vorteile für Sie?

Als Gesundheitspartner begleiten wir Sie: von der Auswahl des besten bKV-Tarifs über den Roll-out in Ihrem Unternehmen bis zur laufenden Kommunikation mit Ihren Mitarbeitern. Wir sind die Schnittstelle zwischen Ihnen, dem Versicherer und Ihrem Team – und sorgen dafür, dass das bKV-Gesundheitsbudget auch aktiv genutzt wird.

Das Ergebnis:

Während klassische Benefits nur eine Nutzungsquote von circa 10% aufweisen, erreichen Sie mit dem ofelos bKV-Upgrade eine Nutzung von bis zu 80% – und profitieren von gesunden und glücklichen Mitarbeitern. 

Mit der bKV von ofelos zur Top-Arbeitgebermarke.
Mehr als nur Benefits.

Description:
Omnis is an Employee Benefits broking and advisory firm (Retirement Funds and Health Benefits) designed to advise on attractive and financially sustainable products and services for an organisation’s employees. 

We are here to ensure you can focus more on your core business to grow and protect revenue to shareholders, and retain good employee relationships through highly competitive Employee Benefits packages.

Healthcare:
We offer advice and education around the benefits and cost appropriateness of the health products offered to your employees. We develop structured healthcare programs that can include:

•	A competitive and relevant company healthcare policy, 
•	Health Audits, to understand current programs, covers and interventions to identify how products are integrating and not duplicated through ancillary products used by the company,
•	Regular advice around the competitiveness of your chosen healthcare products 
and services. As the environment evolves, new products are regularly introduced and existing products change significantly.

Retirement: 
Retirement is highly regulated in South Africa and doesn’t currently enforce the behaviour of long-term savings. Even with the latest legislative changes.  

In this environment, our role is to constantly communicate the right behaviours about saving for the long-term. Maximising savings is our objective.  

Group Risk Benefits:
(Life, Disability and Funeral cover) are seen as high priority benefits in South Africa due to the working class’s family responsibilities and circumstances. 

The value in offering these benefits within a group can have significant cost and eligibility benefits to employees within your organisation. It is however critical to get the right balance between long term savings, and group risk cover to ensure employees prepare for both life changing scenarios.

Name: BIQ Benefícios
Description:
A BIQ Benefícios surgiu há 20 anos, a partir da colaboração de três empresas de renome do ramo alimentício que, juntas, concentraram toda sua experiência e conhecimento em uma única marca.
 O desejo de revolucionar o mercado por meio de um produto inovador foi o combustível principal para a BIQ. Ela oferece serviços de qualidade aos seus clientes, credenciados e colaboradores, por meio dos cartões benefícios:
 
•	BIQ Private Label: um cartão de marca própria aceito por 20 mil estabelecimentos brasileiros espalhados em mais de 600 cidades. Com ele, o funcionário dispõe dos benefícios VR e VA.

•	BIQ ELO DUO: com um alcance de 8,7 milhões de estabelecimentos, o BIQ DUO ELO possui as funções VR, VA e Multibenefícios, como mobilidade, cultura, saúde, educação, home office e saldo livre. Além disso, ele possui a função crédito e pagamento por aproximação, possibilitando, também, compras online e nos principais aplicativos de delivery.
 
Por fim, a BIQ tem diferenciais que proporcionam vantagens a sua empresa:
•	Credenciada pelo PAT: um programa governamental criado para melhorar a qualidade de vida dos trabalhadores brasileiros por meio de incentivos fiscais às empresas como, por exemplo, dedução de até 4% no Imposto de Renda, bem como isenções de encargos sociais, descontos em taxas sob benefícios, entre outros.

Tudo isso contribui para uma melhora significativa no ambiente de trabalho, com colaboradores mais motivados, redução do absenteísmo, melhora na produtividade e potencialização na atração e retenção de talentos. Ao escolher oferecer benefícios por meio da BIQ, a sua empresa passa a ser vista de outra forma, tanto por concorrentes quanto por possíveis candidatos.

Name: Eba Benefícios
Description:
Uma Nova Perspectiva sobre Benefícios
Já parou para pensar por que as empresas oferecem benefícios aos seus funcionários? O salário, por si só, nem sempre é suficiente para garantir satisfação e engajamento.

As pessoas querem ser reconhecidas e valorizadas no ambiente de trabalho, e é nisso que a Eba Benefícios acredita. Afinal, são as PESSOAS que fazem uma empresa crescer e prosperar. Oferecer BENEFÍCIOS é uma estratégia essencial para atrair, reter e motivar talentos.

A Eba Benefícios disponibiliza ao mercado uma plataforma completa para a Gestão de Benefícios, ajudando sua empresa a escolher as melhores opções para seus colaboradores.

Quem Somos
Nossa trajetória na gestão de benefícios começou há mais de 16 anos, dentro da FACESP (Federação das Associações Comerciais do Estado de São Paulo), que reúne mais de 400 Associações Comerciais e representa mais de 250 mil empresas no estado.

Em 2018, após anos operando via FACESP, nos unimos a uma grande operadora de cartões-benefício e fundamos a Eba Benefícios. Mantemos o DNA do associativismo e a parceria com as Associações Comerciais para oferecer a melhor plataforma de gestão de benefícios do Brasil.

Kundenbindung ist mindestens genauso wichtig wie Mitarbeiterbindung! 

In unserem täglichen Kontakt als Versicherungsmakler zu unseren Partnern waren zwei Themen allgegenwertig, die Suche nach neuen Mitarbeitern und das Halten der bestehenden.
Eine große Herausforderung in Zeiten vom allgegenwertigen Fachkräftemangel.  Jedes Unternehmen wünscht sich zufriedene, zuverlässige, motivierte und vor allem gesunde Mitarbeiter. 
Um diese Anforderungen zu erfüllen und im Wettbewerb einen Vorteil auszuspielen, haben wir die Mitarbeiterbonusversicherung entwickelt.

Description:
Appro-Rx is a growing Health Information Technology (HIT) company dedicated to payer medical cost reduction and improvement in patient health outcomes via their provider network. Through the use of Pharmacy Benefit Management (PBM) technologies, Appro-Rx provides customers with prescription drug claims processing, prescription benefit management tools and other IT needs.

The principals of Appro-Rx believe strongly that the PBM model is broken, and we have set out to be industry game changers. We are targeting current practices: spread pricing on prescription drugs, manufacturers’ rebates and mandatory mail order programs that benefit PBMs instead of employers and patients. Our mission to bring pricing fairness and transparency to the PBM industry will enable employers to realize significant cost savings and improved health outcomes for their employees.

COMPLETE CLARITY
With all the complexity inherent in our business, we don’t believe in adding more when it comes to the way we deal with our clients. We consider our clients our partners, so we communicate openly and often before, during and after implementation. We’re proud of our reputation for the cleanest contracts in the industry. Our fiduciary mind-set means we watch over our clients’ drug spends as if they were our own. And once the contract is in place, there are no “mystery fees.”

So much confusion arises regarding rates, rebates, and contract terms that it has been virtually impossible for anyone to identify and activate real opportunities for savings. We knew there had to be a better way. 

So, we built it. 

Illuminate Rx. Designed by pharmacists. Powered by data. Obsessed with outcomes. 

Illuminate Rx offers a new kind of pharmacy benefits management – one that puts clients in control and emphasizes affordability and outcomes – and is offered exclusively by a proven and trusted pharmacy benefits partner, RxBenefits.

From thoughtful formulary design that prioritizes generics and biosimilars for savings that make sense, to network options that meet the unique needs of clients and members, clients choose what they want in their pharmacy benefits program to achieve better clinical outcomes and care at a lower net cost. 

Through our commitment to clarity, control, and collaboration, we are a champion for sustainable, high-quality pharmacy benefits solutions.

Name: Association Member Trust (AMT)
Description:
Association Member Trust (AMT) is a unique not-for-profit multi-association benefits trust formed to serve the group benefit needs of participating association employer members. AMT was formed in 1979 and was the successor to the New Jersey Fuel Merchants Association Insurance Trust, originally established in 1945. Today, AMT offers self-funded health and dental benefits programs, combining employer units from seventeen independent trade associations to maximize claim stability, administrative efficiency, cost savings and a full menu of comprehensive benefits. AMT operates in accordance with the NJ MEWA law and is registered with the NJ Department of Banking and Insurance.

Even though AMT's Health and Dental Benefit plans are self-funded, aggregate and specific stop loss protection for health claims is provided by Horizon Blue Cross Blue Shield of New Jersey to limit loss exposure. Horizon also provides AMT with medical claims processing and managed care services, as well as member access to the Horizon provider networks. The Delta Dental Plan of New Jersey provides AMT with dental claims processing services as well as member access to their dental provider networks. AMT holds monies in reserve to fund incurred but not reported claims as calculated by an independent actuary. Additionally, the AMT Trustees intend to maintain a level of plan equity that satisfies New Jersey's Risk Based Capital requirements for self funded multiple employer welfare arrangements. The Unicare Life and Health Insurance Company provides AMT employers with group Life and AD&D coverage options that are fully insured.

AMT Trust Board of Trustees is composed of representatives from each of the independent trade association’s Sub-Trusts. Currently, seventeen trustees, representing participating sub-association groups according to formula, manage AMT.

The Benefits Connection program is a game-changer for businesses, offering a comprehensive suite of services designed to streamline HR and benefits processes while delivering significant cost savings. Our program encompasses a wide range of products and services, including dental, vision, and health insurance, as well as unique options such as pet insurance and legal shield products. We have established affinity contracts with top carriers like Aetna, offering our members significant discounts on their products. Additionally, our partnership with Highmark as a third-party administrator provides small businesses with flexibility and administrative support.

For small businesses looking to offer competitive benefits to their employees, we provide a large group discounted program for dental and vision insurance. Our 2-card systems and primary care services offer outside-the-box solutions that cater to the diverse needs of businesses.

In an ever-changing regulatory landscape, our platform ensures ACA compliance, handling all reporting and documentation required by the Affordable Care Act. By integrating with payroll services, we streamline the process of reporting deductions and contributions, simplifying payroll management for businesses.

The Benefits Connection program is more than just a benefits platform; it is a gateway to enhanced business operations and cost-effective solutions.

Retirement 101 Class helps working Americans turn confusion about retirement into a clear, practical plan. In partnership with the Association of Financial Educators (AFE), a nationwide 501(c)(3) nonprofit, we provide free, one-hour online webinars that focus on real education, not product sales.

Our “Retirement 101: Strategy for Success” class walks attendees through key decisions around Social Security, pensions, taxes, and investment drawdown so they can build a personalized “Retirement Blueprint” and understand what it takes to make their money last as long as they do.

Each live session includes time for Q&A and the option to schedule a complimentary one-on-one retirement strategy session with a trained Retirement Strategist.

If you are 5–15 years from retirement or already retired and want a straightforward, jargon-free way to stress-test your plan, Retirement 101 Class is built for you.

Name: PURE Primary Care
Description:
As a direct primary care network, we keep the doctor-patient relationship pure by removing the interference of insurance from individualized primary care.   Instead, we offer a subscription model service that offers a better level of care for the most common medical needs.  Insurance is meant to help in times of unexpected high-cost care; it was never meant for everyday primary care.  

We put insurance back in its proper place--for high cost care like surgery or hospitalizations.  We encourage all of our clients to have a high deductible plan or membership in a health sharing group like Sedera Health or Altrua. And we work with local benefits advisors who will put together the most cost-effective insurance options paired with DPC to meet your employees’ needs.  Wanting to jump into a self-funded plan? Our partner advisors can make it a seamless transition.  
PURE Primary Care is expanding our network of practices offering direct primary care to businesses in the greater Washington D.C. area.  We can connect you with top doctors to care for your employees and their families without needing to directly contract with each practice. 
PURE affiliated practices offer same day or next-day appointments for pressing issues, plus the convenience of secure portal, secure text, video chat, phone, as well as in person appointments.  

Our affiliated doctors see less than half the number of patients per day than traditional practices, and they’re not bogged down by the administrative burdens of insurance.  Because of this, they have more time to deliver a higher quality of care.  While traditional practices average just 13 minute visit per patient, PURE Primary Care affiliates spend an average of 40 minutes per visit.  This is truly healthcare as it was always intended to be!

Name: Bowtie Therapeutic Benefits
Description:
Cell and gene therapies are transforming medicine.

These life-changing treatments offer hope for people with rare diseases, but their rising costs are leaving employers exposed and families priced out.

Employers facing a CGT claim have faced an impossible choice: absorb the extraordinary cost—often exceeding $2 million per patient—and risk financial ruin or deny a family access to a lifesaving therapy. Until now.

In a world where profits often dictate care, Bowtie Therapeutic Benefits, PBC, offers a new model. As a Public Benefit Corporation, we’re legally bound to prioritize public good over profits—hardwiring our accountability to people.

By 2030, more than 150 curative therapies will be available, and self-insured employers with 10,000+ employees will face a one-in-three chance of a CGT claim.

At Bowtie, we know every health-care decision carries weight—not just in dollars, but in lives. Together, we can transform how curative therapies are financed, delivered, and experienced.

Human first, always.

Term Life Insurance

Term life insurance can be a great way to help protect a family's financial future. Individuals can get coverage when they need it most, and pay less on premiums.

An experienced and independent agent who represents multiple insurance carriers can make a huge difference in what you pay for coverage.
Medicare Insurance

Medicare by itself has a high deductible for hospital admission, and it only pays 80% of eligible doctor costs. A serious illness could set you back many thousands of dollars. A Medicare Supplement policy covers all or most out-of-pocket medical expenses providing you with peace-of-mind and potential savings. Let us guide you in sorting through the numerous Medicare options. We can also help you in choosing a Medicare prescription plan that includes your specific medications.
Individual and Group Health Insurance

Nearly everybody is confused about their healthcare options - and rightly so. You can't rely on politicians or media reports for a clear and unbiased explanation. You want the facts, not opinions. We'd be happy to evaluate your current coverage and present you with side-by side comparisons of alternatives.
Long-Term Care and Final Expense Insurance. Long-Term Care Insurance gives you the financial means and the support options you desire. Whether you require in-home visits, assisted living or skilled nursing care, Long-Term Care Insurance lifts the burden from those around you, improving the quality of life for yourself and for everyone you hold dear.

Your family will always come first. You wouldn't want them to bear huge and unexpected financial burdens at the time of your passing. No matter what your age, it's absolutely essential to have a plan in place to protect your loved ones when you are no longer able.

Name: Employment Injury Scheme (EIS)-Pilot
Description: The EIS Pilot covers all 4 million workers contributing to the export-oriented readymade garments (RMG) sector of Bangladesh. In cases of work-related injuries, the Pilot provides compensation payments for the permanently disabled and the dependants of deceased workers. This takes the form of monthly payments/pensions, paid as top-ups to the lump-sum compensation already paid by the national institution (via the Central Fund), rendering the level of benefits compatible with international standards (ILO Convention No. 121). The EIS Pilot’s monthly pensions are financed by voluntary contributions from international brands. The amount of the pensions depends on the age and last earned wage of the respective worker, thus serving as an income replacement.

Dollar Based Dental Plans are supported by the American Dental Association, and the dental profession, as they allow for superior dental care while remaining fee for service. With Dollar Based Dental plans you and your employees can enjoy:

Control over your dental care. Your employees pick the dentist they see.
Affordable costs. With Dollar Based Dental, your plan costs are based on actual dental costs incurred, not premium payments paid by employers or plan participants.
90% of your benefit dollars go to actual dental care, not insurance companies.
Available to small and large companies, with or without an existing self-insurance plan.
Co-payments and maximums on total benefits prevent unpleasant surprises at the end of the year. Plan cost increases can thus be minimized or eliminated.
Eliminates pre-authorizations, limited choices for dentists, and typically no exclusions for preexisting conditions.
We’re the low-cost dental plan that saves employers money, while letting employees enjoy hassle free dental services from the provider of their choice

In today’s market, many insurance plans cover services like abortion, birth control, sterilization, IVF, surrogacy, and gender transition treatments with no out-of-pocket costs—services that are fundamentally opposed to Christian values. We believe no employer should be forced to compromise their faith when offering health benefits. That's why HIS Hill Country offers a legal, competitive alternative that enables businesses to provide coverage consistent with their religious and ethical beliefs.

Our Unique Solution
We have developed a health insurance plan tailored specifically for Catholic-led businesses and non-profits, intentionally excluding immoral services while integrating distinctly Catholic benefits. These include coverage for Natural Family Planning and convenient access to Catholic doctors and counselors via the MyCatholicDoctor Telehealth network.

Why Choose HIS Hill Country?
Our self-insurance plans are competitively priced, providing substantial savings while remaining true to your values. Plus, we offer a concierge-level service experience—no more navigating frustrating phone trees or waiting on hold. Your employees will receive prompt, personalized support, ensuring they get the assistance they need quickly.

We offer both personalized solutions for employers with existing plans and thoughtfully pre-designed options for those without current coverage, ensuring a seamless and ideal fit for your organization’s needs.

Name: Health Matching Account Services
Description:
The HMA(Health Matching Account) is the ultimate medical savings product available that will bring you life-changing health and financial savings. The HMA secures you up to $2 in medical matching or more for every $1 above and beyond what you contribute into your program on a monthly basis as the program progresses.

In addition, your pharmacy prescriptions as well as your dental and vision expenses, which are typically not covered under a major-medical health plan and many Medicare plans, can also be taken care of with your HMA program. The HMA empowers you with a product that will deliver you more health care purchasing power than ever before.

You can access your HMA matching to pay for your qualifying medical needs by using your HMA Member ID Card with your health care providers. Health Matching Account Services will work with your providers to verify both the eligibility of the service and that you have a sufficient amount of medical matching available in your HMA program to pay for this medical expense. No further action will need to be taken by the HMA participant at their providers. You can check your current amount of HMA medical matching that you have available to use any time either on your HMA member portal or mobile app.

Name: Simplify Prior Authorization
Description:
The SPA initiative began with a white paper in Fall 2020 - Private Payer Prior Authorization in Canada: Simplify Prior Authorization (SPA) which you can download from our website. 

The white paper highlighted the process challenges of prior authorization (PA) which places a heavy administrative burden on all stakeholders and can delay access to medications for patients. More education on PA is also needed, as are best practice standards so that plan sponsors and their advisors understand key metrics on how each payer manages PA claims.

A lot has changed since 2021 and SPA is proud to have been part of this. 

SPA and our multi stakeholder advisory group identified OkRx as a preferred electronic prior authorization (ePA) solution provider, launched a new and comprehensive SPA website containing education and key information on PA, and deliver an advocacy and education strategy consisting of webinars, blogs, podcasts.

The efforts of SPA and other key stakeholders like OkRx are driving the change in PA. The process of moving to ePA has begun, and with implementation there will be administrative efficiencies, improve time to access for patients, and improve data analytics for product listing and health outcome agreements. The most innovative insurers will soon move to electronic prior authorization (ePA). 

As well as facilitating the transition to ePA, the SPA initiative will be launching Best Practice Standards Guide for PA in 2024. This will be an essential tool for advisors and plan sponsors to evaluate insurers PA practices.

Whether you want to know more, or you want to get involved, all are welcome to reach out at info@simplifypriorauth.ca and speak to Denise Balch, Project Manager.

Medical Captive Underwriters brand pillars are Transparent, Trusted, and Experienced.    Bring your captive to us, or we can arrange a captive for you.  If captive ownership is the privilege you seek, let us help you create your bespoke solution. 

ClearCaptive is our 50 state open access employee benefit group captive program.  Launched on January 1, 2015, ClearCaptive is proven to lower the employer medical spend and the impact of medical inflation on employer profitability.

TIB’S ORIGINS
TIB’s pre-descendant company Norpet Insurance Brokers Lesotho (Pty) Ltd was operated in Lesotho for 22 years from 1979 to 2001.   Norpet was purchased by the then AON in 2001, Norman Dixie remained with AON Lesotho until 2007 and subsequently left to start what is now TIB Insurance Brokers in 2008. 
The Dixie family has deep roots in the Mountain Kingdom and has been in business in Lesotho for 5 generations.   In the insurance sector the late Denys Dixie became a founder shareholder of the Lesotho’s first insurance brokerage, Kingsway Brokers in 1969.   His son Norman Dixie, continued the family name into the next generation, and today Normans Son Garth Dixie continues the legacy

The Scheme is financially sound and maintains statutory solvency levels well above the promulgated requirements in terms of the Medical Schemes Act, which prescribes that medical schemes maintain a minimum solvency ratio of 25%.

Name: We Read Markets Before They Speak
Description: "We read markets before they speak" refers to the idea that successful traders or investors can anticipate market movements by analyzing trends, patterns, and signals before they fully manifest. It’s about understanding the subtle clues and behaviors in the market that precede major shifts. Just like a skilled reader can understand the underlying emotions or intentions in a conversation before words are spoken, a keen market observer can sense the impending direction of stocks, commodities, or economies through charts, sentiment, and market psychology. This proactive approach allows individuals to position themselves advantageously, often making decisions based on foresight rather than reacting to news or outcomes after they’ve already occurred.

Name: BritCare
Description:
Most people in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) are required to have a medical insurance policy, provided by their employer or taken out privately (business owners, investors or freelancers). However, your existing policy may have certain limitations, leaving you exposed to shortfalls in coverage or limiting your treatment options, just when you need it most.

If you are in a company-sponsored plan, very few allow you to continue coverage and maintain the benefits when you leave employment, retire and/or relocate. This can leave you and your family highly exposed and if you have pre-existing conditions you may be unable to obtain comprehensive coverage moving forward.

BritCare addresses all such issues, with in-built continuity and portability options, removing these risks and ensuring you are truly covered not just now, but for the rest of your life, including being your primary policy in the future.

Name: FAS -Fondazione ANDI Salute
Description:
LA NOSTRA STORIA
FAS ha un’origine abbastanza recente, come tutti i Fondi sanitari esistenti in Italia. Nasce nel 2015 come Fondo DOC odontoiatrico e viene iscritto nel 2016 all’Anagrafe Ministeriale dei Fondi nella sezione. Il recente Congresso Politico ANDI, avvenuto nell’ottobre 2021, ha deliberato l’iscrizione del FAS come Fondo NON DOC nella sezione B dell’Anagrafe dei Fondi del Ministero della Salute.

IL FONDO SANITARIO
Il FAS – Fondazione ANDI Salute- è un fondo sanitario integrativo iscritto all’ Anagrafe dei Fondi istituita presso il Ministero della Salute, nella sezione B dei fondi ex art. 51.

Il FAS è stato istituito da ANDI, Associazione Nazionale Dentisti italiani, il maggior sindacato italiano di categoria e rappresenta l’unico fondo sanitario iscritti alla sezione B dell’anagrafe ad essere dedicato prevalentemente all’Odontoiatria. 

Il FAS è una realtà assolutamente atipica nel sistema di riferimento anche perché pur contando sulla più grande rete odontoiatrica nazionale non adotta il modello delle convenzioni tariffarie e lascia libero il paziente di essere curato dal professionista di sua fiducia.

Name: Ahava Benefits Group
Description:
Employee benefits are additional perks that companies offer to their employees in addition to their regular salaries or wages. These benefits can include things like health insurance, retirement plans, paid time off, bonuses, and more.
One of the most common employee benefits is health insurance, which provides employees with coverage for medical expenses, including doctor visits, prescription drugs, and hospital stays. Many employers also offer retirement plans, such as 401(k)s, which allow employees to save for their future by contributing a portion of their earnings to a retirement account.
Paid time off is another important employee benefit, which can include vacation time, sick leave, and holidays. Many companies also offer bonuses or other incentives to motivate employees, such as performance-based bonuses or profit-sharing programs.
Other employee benefits may include wellness programs, flexible work schedules, tuition reimbursement, and childcare assistance. These benefits can help employees maintain a healthy work-life balance and can contribute to their overall job satisfaction and well-being.
Overall, employee benefits are an important part of the compensation package that companies offer to their employees, and they can help attract and retain top talent in a competitive job market.

Don’t struggle on your own with caregiving questions and problems.  Boost your own well-being and get the answers and assurance you need from Help4Caregivers. Curated by a registered nurse with over 20 years of family caregiving experience, with Help4Caregivers, you’ll find trustworthy Problem-Solving and Self-Care resources in five easy-to-search categories.  

Get the Facts--Benefits include 24/7 access to vital caregiving information and answers to your most pressing questions on topics like eldercare; specific diseases and conditions; managing medications; legal and insurance issues.

Talk to Someone--You’ll also be able to talk to call-center advocates at dozens of toll-free helplines.  You can ask for advice on providing and managing care; finding financial assistance; caring for a veteran, and more.  

Show Me How--Trusted organizations like the American Cancer Society and the Alzheimer’s Association have created brief, “how-to” videos that show practical and effective ways to do the day-to-day tasks of caregiving.  Help4Caregivers gives you user-friendly access to videos on cancer and dementia care; providing physical care in your home; and also how to care for yourself as you care for others. 

Answer COVID Questions--Do you worry about how to keep your loved one safe from COVID?  Get quick and reliable answers from our pre-screened listing of toll-free helplines and links to helpful, trusted medical information.

Practice Self-Care--Help4Caregivers also helps keep you safe and healthy with online assessments to monitor your well-being; shared caregiver stories that provide information and a sense of community; and evidence-based strategies and action plans to boost your resilience by practicing self-care.

Let us at Help4Caregivers help you!  Visit us at https://www.help4cgs.com

Name: TPA Systems Inc.
Description:
TPA Systems Inc. (TPAS) is a licensed third-party administrator (TPA) that specializes in the implementation and administration of the three most important flexible compensation plans offered to employees today: the Health Reimbursement Arrangement (HRA), the Section 125 Cafeteria Plan (Flex Plan), and the Health Savings Account (HSA). 

As Americans feel the sting of high inflation plus out-of-control healthcare costs and premiums, these benefit arrangements are an increasingly popular solution to offset the financial strain by significantly saving both employers and employees on taxes, premiums, and healthcare costs.  

Each arrangement (HRA, FSA & HSA) has its own unique advantages. Here’s a few.

-Lowers group premiums
-Lowers healthcare costs by paying with tax-free money
-Lowers payroll taxes, FICA and Medicare withholdings for both parties
-Increases take-home pay for employees

Additional benefits include:

- HRAs, FSAs, and HSAs are staple benefits that attract and retain top employees
- Increases employee wellness all the way around – mentally, financially, and physically
- Self-sustaining benefits, as the payroll tax savings alone almost always pays the total cost of administration

While there are many companies that do what we do, we are not your ordinary run-of-the mill TPA.  With over 15 years of experience, we can handle many different setups across a wide scope of complexity. 

We also offer:

-Impeccable service & easy setup
-Low installation and ongoing administrative fees
-Cutting edge self-service portals and debit card technology that can be stacked together for all plans

Please visit our website for much more information on flexible compensation plans and why we are your best choice in TPA Administration. Be sure to review our testimonials.

La struttura organizzativa negli anni ha abbandonato l’impronta di individualismo e si basa oggi sulla forza del team: ogni persona costituisce una parte fondamentale del processo di crescita dell’azienda. Dal 1988 ad oggi la Società ha dato tranquillità e protezione a milioni di lavoratori.
Ai Clienti vengono fornite idee innovative per la progettazione ex novo e “chiavi in mano” di iniziative assistenziali e previdenziali, armonizzandole con quelle eventualmente già in essere nelle rispettive aziende, ottimizzandone le risorse ed allineandone tempestivamente la gestione a ogni cambio di normativa.
Le analisi e le proposte di Europa Benefits si traducono in sensibili risparmi, favorevoli rapporti costi-benefici e miglioramenti nell’applicazione di tutte le agevolazioni fiscali e contribuendo a un notevole benessere dei loro dipendenti e collaboratori.

The platform supports multi-modal data fusion and scalable processing, making it ideal for both clinical diagnostics and large-scale research studies. MRI MetaSignal empowers clinicians and scientists to decode hidden layers of imaging information, driving more accurate diagnoses and personalized treatment strategies.

Name: MidMarket Health
Description:
There's a sweet spot in the market that's perfect for self-funding, and it's exactly where mid-size companies operate. You're large enough that your risk pool provides meaningful data and predictability. You're small enough to be agile and implement innovative benefit designs quickly. And you're at exactly the stage where controlling your largest expenses can fuel your next phase of growth.
Yet this is precisely the segment that gets overlooked. Small companies are told they're too small to self-fund. Large enterprises have the internal expertise and broker relationships to access self-funding. Mid-size companies? You're often stuck in the worst of both worlds—paying large-company premiums while getting small-company service and attention.
This is why we focus exclusively on mid-size businesses and why we believe self-funding isn't just an option for companies in this space—it's the only solution that makes strategic sense.

Visión

Nuestra visión en Latino Seguros USA es ser el proveedor líder de atención al cliente de seguros de salud para latinos en los Estados Unidos. Aspiramos a construir relaciones sólidas y duraderas con nuestros clientes, convirtiéndonos en sus socios de confianza para navegar por el complejo mundo de la atención médica. A través de la innovación, la inclusión y la dedicación, nuestro objetivo es mejorar la salud y la calidad de vida de cada familia latina a la que servimos.

Name: Insubu
Description:
Purpose
Social Impact through employee benefits.
Insubu's purpose is to improve the wellbeing of South Africa's working class through financial inclusion. 
Insubu was founded after years of investing in fintech startups with a focus on ethical disruption, financial inclusion, doing well by doing good and profit with a purpose. Our sister company, Fitech Ventures, Home | FiTech Ventures has invested in a number of fintech startups, some of which are used to provide Insubu services. 

Financial inclusion is a crucial aspect of a thriving economy, ensuring that all individuals have access to essential financial services. In South Africa, the financial services sector is well-regulated, boasting consumer protection measures. However, this rigorous regulation often results in excessive costs* that are passed down to consumers, hindering financial inclusion for the majority of the population. Insubu uses  technology to simplify processes and reduce costs, which enables financial inclusion and the provison of affordable, sustainable financial services

Live Well: Focuses on physical wellness through promoting health screenings, physical activity, good nutrition, and access to quality medical network throughout employees' health and wellness journey.

Think Well: Focuses on mental wellness through fostering awareness of employees' mental health and providing tailored solutions in the form of education, self-help tools, coaching, counselling, and access to preferred mental health providers.

Plan Well: Focuses on financial wellness by improving financial literacy, providing self-help tools and solutions and if needed, access to professional help for planning and managing finances across different life stages.

Feel Well: Focuses on social wellness to reinforce employees' self-esteem by building an inclusive work environment and supportive network that fosters a sense of belonging to a wider community. Doing so promotes purpose and resilience among employees.

Name: Planwatch
Description:
Welcome to Planwatch, a powerful web-based tool that helps health plans, hospital systems, insurance companies, TPAs, HMOs, and Medicare/Medicaid payors examine and manage their medical, dental, vision and RX claims activity. Our on-demand platform allows users to data mine and aggregate their claim activity into one easy-to-use reporting engine, resulting in successful outcomes and well-managed self-funded programs.

Some of the features of our product include the ability to explore data at the most detailed level, provide model plan modifications, evaluate health plan economics, connect medical and prescription information by claimant, detail medical/prescription patterns and utilization, protect health plans by illustrating costs, separate user access and permission rights, deliver user-defined capabilities for product functionality, and analyze benchmark plans and employee costs by various categories. Additionally, we can simplify PCORI fee filing and calculation, assist with vendor fee calculation and payment, and provide branded, customized, full-color reports in high-resolution PDF and Excel formats.

Founded in 2005, Planwatch has gained a reputation for providing excellent service and expertise, as well as 24/7 monitoring. We primarily work with Third Party Administrators (TPA) and have received testimonials from satisfied clients on our website. If you are interested in learning more about how Planwatch can help your organization manage and minimize expenditure, please visit our website or contact us for more information.

Education financière-  protéger les travailleurs  – bâtir la résilience –renforcer la solidarité

 Travailleurs du secteur informel – les entreprises – les associations et clubs sportifs...

-	C’est un fond de solidarité pour permettre aux membres en situation de difficultés.

Name: benbetter.ai
Description:
We built BenBetter.ai because benefits are broken. Carriers profit when employees don't file. Vendors hide fees in 400-page contracts. And HR teams get blamed when nobody uses the $800/employee benefits package.

We've sat on both sides—wrestling renewals as benefit managers and pitching solutions as vendor reps. That dual view showed us exactly where the money leaks. So we built the intelligence layer every HR team needs.

Our arsenal:
Scout — Our claim automation engine that ensures employees get the supplemental insurance payouts they're owed. No forms, no codes, just cash. Carriers hate it. Employees love it. 60-90% never filed before. Now it's automatic.

The 5500 — Every benefits decision your competitors make, decoded. Benchmark real spend, spot carrier patterns, see who's switching and why. It's the intelligence Bloomberg Terminal HR teams have been waiting for.

Research by benbetter.ai — Custom deep-dives that answer the questions keeping you up at night. Competitive intelligence, vendor analysis, compliance audits. We dig where others won't.

The result? Dollars stop leaking. Employees actually use what you've bought. Vendors can't hide behind complexity. And you stop playing defense.
It's the toolkit every underdog HR team needs to play—and win—like a giant.

Description:
DreamPath is a game-changing platform that helps companies provide a unique and impactful benefit to their employees: the opportunity to achieve homeownership. We partner with organizations to offer a comprehensive program that empowers employees throughout their homeownership journey.

Here's how it works: DreamPath collaborates with employers to set up a customized plan tailored to their workforce. Employees receive ongoing financial education and resources to navigate the complexities of buying a home, including understanding mortgage options, managing finances, and evaluating the real estate market.

Through our strategic partnerships with lenders and real estate professionals, we facilitate access to exclusive benefits, such as discounted mortgage rates and preferred pricing on properties. This not only helps employees save money but also expedites the home buying process.

DreamPath's program also includes an innovative fund administration system. Employers contribute to an escrow account on behalf of each employee, building a financial reserve for future use towards down payments or closing costs. Should an employee leave the company before the established vesting period, the funds return to the employer, ensuring financial security and risk mitigation.

By offering DreamPath as a corporate benefit, companies enhance employee retention, attract top talent, and cultivate a workforce committed to long-term success. Join us in revolutionizing the way organizations support their employees' homeownership goals and create a brighter future together.
